_comment: User-facing text for course-registration/course-registration.gs. Edit here; changes are live within ~5 minutes (script cache TTL). Use {{placeholder}} syntax for dynamic values.
no_reply_disclaimer: вљ  This message was sent from an unmonitored mailbox. Please do not reply to this email. For assistance, contact {{contact_email}}.
admin_notification_subject: New MorphoCloud Course Request вЂ” Action Required
instructor_approved_body:
Hello {{instructor_name}},

Your MorphoCloud course registration has been approved!

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
YOUR COURSE DETAILS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Course:     {{course_name}}
Team Slug:  {{team_slug}}

Getting your students set up is a TWO-STEP process. Both steps must be
completed in order before a student can use MorphoCloud.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
STEP 1 вЂ” STUDENTS JOIN THE MORPHOCLOUD ORGANIZATION
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Each student must complete the MorphoCloud Intake Form to register and
receive a GitHub organization invitation. Share these instructions:

  1. Go to the MorphoCloud Intake Form:
     {{intake_form_url}}

  2. On the first page, select:
       "Part of an academic course"

  3. Enter the Course Team Slug exactly as shown:
       {{team_slug}}

  4. After submitting, they will receive a GitHub organization invitation
     by email. They must ACCEPT it within 7 days at:
     https://github.com/settings/organizations

  Once accepted, the student becomes a member of the MorphoCloud GitHub
  organization and is added to your course team.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
STEP 2 вЂ” STUDENTS REQUEST THEIR CLOUD INSTANCE
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Only after completing Step 1 and accepting the GitHub invitation can a
student request a cloud-computing instance. Share this link вЂ” the course
team slug is already pre-filled to prevent typos:

  {{issue_template_url}}

  The student opens the link, submits the form (no editing needed), and
  their instance will be provisioned automatically. Credentials will be
  emailed to them when it is ready.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
SUMMARY FOR STUDENTS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
  Step 1: Complete the intake form в†’ accept GitHub invitation
  Step 2: Open the instance request link в†’ submit в†’ wait for credentials

вЂ” MorphoCloud Team

instructor_rejected_subject: MorphoCloud Course Registration вЂ” Update Required
instructor_rejected_body:
Hello {{instructor_name}},

Thank you for your interest in MorphoCloud for your course, {{course_name}}.

After reviewing your registration, we are unable to approve it at this time.

If you would like to discuss this further or provide additional information, please contact us at {{contact_email}}.

вЂ” MorphoCloud Team
{{contact_email}}
